tests.intent: The optimization run pins the approved complete T12.1 baseline, exact replay identity, public decompressed schema digest and approved golden manifest before any change is attempted.

A complete contiguous attempt journal records start and finish events, hash-chain ancestry, source revision, diff identity, measurement outcome, decision and publication state for every experiment including regressions.

Every attempt names the dominant stage from the immediately preceding measured accepted state, includes observed stage evidence, and receives explicit human confirmation that work targeted a real bottleneck.
Every experiment has a nonempty source diff and fingerprint in an allowed SQL, transport or client optimization class, while consecutive stopping attempts are technically distinct.
Baseline and every optimization attempt contain the exact fixed 300-frame 320x200 replay with 30 warm frames and 270 evaluator-owned externally timed measured frames.
Attempt p50, p95, effective FPS, stage distributions and improvement percentages are independently derived from complete raw observations rather than copied summaries or marketing estimates.
Public decompressed response schema and every approved correctness golden remain pinned to baseline digests before and after each attempted optimization, including rolled-back regressions.
Every attempt records an unskipped complete correctness gate with exact declared assertion totals and a content-addressed machine report before its performance result may influence selection.
Every attempt reruns all required mutation operators, records exact killed and required totals with no survivors, and retains the content-addressed machine report.
Negative and non-improving results remain in the contiguous ledger with raw artifacts and an explicit accepted or rolled-back decision; no result can be silently omitted or renumbered.
Execution stops only after the final two technically distinct bottleneck-targeted attempts each improve median latency by less than five percent versus the best accepted state then available.

The selected best revision is independently replayed on local and cloud stacks, preserving identity and producing complete externally measured samples plus directly derived p50, p95 and effective FPS.

The final report states highest verified local and cloud FPS as direct observations, identifies their selected revision and raw evidence, and contains no projected, estimated or portable-threshold claim.
Journal, per-attempt samples, diffs, correctness, mutations, reports and final environment evidence are atomic content-addressed safe-path artifacts with UTC bounds and evaluator-owned timing.

Recursive evidence scanning rejects secrets and endpoints, while missing production, ancestry, cloud proof, raw evidence, database observations, synthetic markers or any validation exception prevents PASS.
